title: ilex dasyphylla
intro: Ilex dasyphylla, also known as the Queensland Holly or Forest Holly, is a species of flowering plant in the holly family, native to eastern Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ilex dasyphylla include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and alleviating digestive problems. Ilex dasyphylla is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, its leaves and berries are used in traditional herbal remedies.
